utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details: (1) health_coverage: The format requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists a named plan, mentions physical and mental coverage, and provides separate monthly costs (€210 + €120). This is fully specified per format. (2) property_coverage: The format requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides a named add-on for photography equipment and liability, features, and an approximate monthly cost. However, it is not clearly a home/contents insurance policy; it is an equipment & liability add-on and does not explicitly state home/contents coverage as required. Thus not fully specified per the required item. (3) travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. The plan includes a named travel plan, features, and a monthly cost. This is fully specified. (4) additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan states 'None beyond the specified plans'—this satisfies the field (no services, implicitly zero cost). (5) total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly and annual totals. Although the monthly sum of listed items (210+120+40+110=€480) matches, this is fully specified. Therefore, included items fully specified: health_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget = 4. Total items = 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items: EliteCare Premium Plan (health), Tailored Photography Equipment & Liability Add-on (property), and EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel). From the ground-truth ratings: EliteCare Premium Plan appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with a rating of 2, and EliteCare Premium Plan under mental_health also has rating 2; however, the plan name used in the final plan for health is a single combined 'EliteCare Premium Plan' with separate costs for physical and mental, so we map the plan name to the health plan rating available, which is 2. The property item 'Tailored Photography Equipment & Liability Add-on' is not an exact match to any single ground-truth plan name; the closest components are 'Technology Protection' (rating 8) and 'Home Office Protection' (rating 7), but since the final plan uses a combined, non-listed name, it cannot be directly mapped to an exact ground-truth item, so it must be omitted from RATINGS to avoid incorrect mapping. The travel item 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' matches mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.EliteTravel Premium Plan with rating 2.
